inputs.label: Cost of Attendance
inputs.businessContext: Total yearly cost of attendance including tuition, fees, room, and board.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total yearly cost of attendance including tuition, fees, room, and board.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Öğrenim ücreti, harçlar, oda ve yemek dahil yıllık toplam katılım maliyeti.

inputs.label: Merit Aid Cap (%)
inputs.businessContext: Maximum percentage of cost of attendance that can be covered by merit aid.

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum percentage of cost of attendance that can be covered by merit aid.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Katılım maliyetinin başarı bursu ile karşılanabilecek maksimum yüzdesi.

inputs.label: Other Financial Aid
inputs.businessContext: Total amount of other scholarships, grants, or financial aid already awarded.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total amount of other scholarships, grants, or financial aid already awarded.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Halihazırda verilmiş diğer burs, hibe veya mali yardımların toplam tutarı.

inputs.label: Expected Family Contribution
inputs.businessContext: Expected family contribution as determined by financial need analysis.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected family contribution as determined by financial need analysis.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mali ihtiyaç analizine göre belirlenen beklenen aile katkısı.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
